form.formComment: Didn't do much last time out, 8th (Fr3) over 1770m after being wide early at Albury beaten 35 m by Pirani Princess (2:09.20) in NR up to 47 on February 13 at $7.50. Before that 8th (Fr2) over 2270m after showing early speed at Riverina Paceway, beaten 35 m by Kyleigh (2:42.80) in NR up to 47 on February 6 at $5. Draws well so can improve.

Over-raced during the middle stages of the event.

form.formComment: Recent efforts haven't been up to her best. Last start was driven from back in the field when 7th (Fr7) over 1740m at Riverina Paceway beaten 21 m by Gem N Em (2:02.80) in NR up to 58 M on April 4 at $51. The run prior 7th (Fr7) over 1740m at Riverina Paceway was 9th-16.4 at the bell, beaten 9 m by Franco Nickelback (2:02.70) in NR up to 53 on March 20 at $101. Gets her best draw for some time and with her best form she is up to this.

form.formComment: Last start 4th (Fr2) over 2000m at Temora, at the bell was leading 3.8 beaten 9 m by Millwood Grace (2:30.20) in NR up to 53 on April 6 at $2.50. Before that, was well back in the run when 8th (Fr8) over 1609m after racing wide at Menangle, beaten 30 m by Emperor (1:52.90) in 3yo+ 2LTW so eligible 3yo+ NR55 on February 24 at $7.50. Strong claims from a good draw.

form.formComment: Recent form below what she is capable of. Last start 7th (Sr3) over 1635m at Temora was 8th-15.5 at the bell, beaten 11 m by Modern Sheen (2:) in NR up to 47 M on April 6 at $4.20. At the previous start 5th (Fr2) over 1760m at Junee, at the bell was 3rd-5.8 beaten 12 m by Potter (2:10.20) in NR up to 53 on March 31 at $9. Worth another chance. Contender.

form.formComment: Two back was well beaten into eighth behind Le Betty at Riverina Paceway over 2270m in a NR up to 58 on March 20 at $34. Then a handy effort when well beaten into third after showing early speed, behind Franco Nickelback at Riverina Paceway over 1740m in a NR up to 55 on April 4 at $26. Likely to be thereabouts.

previousStarts.stewardsComment: Pulled hard during the early and middle stages of the event.

form.formComment: Failed to impress last start; 7th (Fr6) over 1740m after being wide early at Riverina Paceway, beaten 21 m by Franco Nickelback (2:03.70) in NR up to 55 on April 4 at $61. Showed ability the race before when she won by a head after showing early speed, (Fr1) at Riverina Paceway (2:05.30) beating Crimson Rock in NR up to 47 on March 27 at $5.50 at the bell was leading 3.1. Not easy from this draw.
